resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-insider-sentiment
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool insider sentiment
resourceTemplates.description: Returns monthly insider sentiment (MSPR - Monthly Share Purchase Ratio) for a stock identified by its ISIN.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-news-sentiment
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool news sentiment
resourceTemplates.description: Returns aggregated news sentiment metrics for a stock identified by its ISIN, including bullish and bearish percentages and news activity.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-social-sentiment
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool social sentiment
resourceTemplates.description: Returns social media sentiment data from Reddit and Twitter for a stock identified by its ISIN.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-price-metrics
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool price metrics
resourceTemplates.description: Returns price performance statistics for a stock identified by its ISIN, including 52-week high/low, trading volume averages and beta.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-fund-ownership
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool fund ownership
resourceTemplates.description: Returns mutual fund holders and allocation percentages for a stock identified by its ISIN.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-institutional-ownership
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool institutional ownership
resourceTemplates.description: Returns institutional investor holdings from 13-F filings for a stock identified by its ISIN.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-sector-metrics
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool sector metrics
resourceTemplates.description: Returns average and median financial ratios by sector for a given region. Supported regions include NA, EU and Asia.
